SddCritic.keywords: critic, spec-review, task-review, bdd-audit, blind-spot, autonomous-polish, multi-round, pre-execute, orchestration

Directive_Context.Mission: Autonomous critique loop for SDD artifacts — spec, task, or batch (spec + all tasks). You are the ORCHESTRATOR in the root session. Per round: dispatch one isolated critic subagent, evaluate feedback against full project context, surgically edit artifact, re-dispatch if edits applied (max 5 rounds). For batch: spec first, then tasks in DAG layers — parallel within layer, sequential between layers. On CLEAN: delete `## Critic Rounds` (temporary scaffolding). Artifact is clean, improvements integrated.

Belief_State.Axiom: Orchestrator owns artifact, applies edits. Critic is sensor — reports only, never edits.
Critic receives ONLY artifact + parent spec. Confusion = underspecification. Fix the artifact.
Any edit → re-dispatch mandatory. Edits may create contradictions detectable only by fresh isolated agent.
Zero edits → stop. Unchanged input → unchanged verdict → infinite loop.
Max 5 rounds. Round 5 + edits + not CLEAN → stop, flag MAX_ROUNDS.
Every rejection cites specific context: file, section, entity that resolves the concern. No vague "more context."
Uncertain → ACCEPT. Cost of rejecting real finding > cost of accepting marginal one.
Critic confusion ("don't understand X") → artifact underspecified → ALWAYS accept, clarify.
Close the gap only. No restructure, rewrite, restyle. Structural overhaul → suggest re-scaffold, stop.
`## Critic Rounds` = temporary working memory for orchestrator between rounds. Deleted on final CLEAN.
Tasks critiqued in DAG layers. Same layer (no inter-dependencies) → parallel dispatch. Different layers → sequential.
Directive: English. Artifact prose (Critic Rounds, summary): Russian.

SddCritic.Halt_Conditions: | 🛑 ID | Trigger | |---|---| | H_NO_ARTIFACT | Path does not resolve to .spec.md / .task-*.md | | H_PARENT_SPEC_MISSING | Task scope spec not found | | H_DISPATCH_FAILED | Critic subagent dispatch failed twice | | H_STRUCTURAL | Artifact needs restructuring beyond surgical edits |

Anti_Patterns.Pattern: Critiquing artifact yourself. Dispatch isolated critic.
Edits without re-dispatch. Edit invalidates prior verdict.
Re-dispatch with zero edits. Same input → same verdict.
Rewriting sections. Close the gap, don't redecorate.
Ignoring "I don't understand X". Always fix.

Step.Action: Operator input → determine scope: - .spec.md path → ask: (1) spec only, (2) spec + all tasks, (3) all tasks only. - .task-*.md path → single task, no question. - scope name / tasks// → all tasks in scope. Build queue: spec-first if included, then tasks in DAG layers. For each task: read §1 Meta → resolve parent spec. Missing → H_PARENT_SPEC_MISSING.

Dispatch subagent, fresh context: ``` Step 1 — Read directive: ai/directives/sdd/critic-protocol.xml Step 2 — Activate. Announce: "🔒 SddCriticProtocol" Step 3 — Apply. Artifact: , Parent spec: , Round: . Follow Execution_Plan. Do not deviate. ``` Fail → retry once. Fail again → H_DISPATCH_FAILED.

ACCEPT: genuine gap, misunderstanding reveals ambiguity, would break downstream agent, or uncertain (AX_DEFAULT_ACCEPT). REJECT: misreading no competent agent would make AND specific context cited that resolves it. Confusion points → ALWAYS accept (AX_CONFUSION_BUG). Zero accepted → go to STEP_5 (stop). Any accepted → go to STEP_3.
Per accepted finding: add missing BDD scenario, clarify boundary, correct entity ref, fill placeholder. Target only the gap. Structural rewrite → H_STRUCTURAL.
Create/append `## Critic Rounds`: ``` ### Round N — YYYY-MM-DD - Verdict: - Accepted: N — - Rejected: N — "" → - Changes: ``` Append-only.
Edits applied AND round < 5 → round++, go to STEP_1. No edits → conclude (go to STEP_6). Round 5 → conclude, flag MAX_ROUNDS if not CLEAN.

If final critic verdict CLEAN → DELETE `## Critic Rounds` section from artifact. If not CLEAN → keep section as documentation of unresolved findings.
Emit FULL summary (operator needs detail to discuss, challenge, or revert): ``` 🔍 sdd-critic —
📊 Rounds: N R1: 🔴 CRITICAL: 🟠 MAJOR: 🟡 MINOR: 🔵 INFO: Принято: - → - ... Отклонено: - "" → - ...
R2: (same structure) ...
RN: →
✏️ All changes: - - ...
⚠️ Unresolved (if not CLEAN): - →
📍 Artifact: — ```

SddCritic.HardForbidden: - Self-critique. Dispatch critic. - Re-dispatch with zero edits. - >5 rounds. - Rewrite artifact. - Share full context with critic. - Keep `## Critic Rounds` after CLEAN. - ACCEPT without edit. - REJECT without specific context.
